name: Diplomatic Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the caramel coating, combine sugar, butter, and water in a small saucepan. Cook on medium heat until the mixture begins to bubble and turns a light caramel brown. Be very careful not to burn it.
2. Pour the hot caramel into a 1 1/2 quart pre-warmed baking dish. Hold the dish with potholders and roll it around, coating the sides. Set aside to cool.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In a large bowl, crumble white bread (without crusts) and mix with sweet condensed milk, water, baking powder, beaten egg yolks, vermouth, flour, and vanilla extract. Stir in drained tropical fruit.
5. Pour the batter into the caramel-coated baking dish.
6. Place the dish in a pan of water and bake for 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from the water bath and let cool completely.
7. Invert the dish onto a serving platter and slice.
